Class Minotaur

java.lang.Object
Entity
Enemy
Minotaur
public class Minotaur extends Enemy
Class file for the Minotaur class, this is a subclass of the abstract Enemy class

The Minotaur class has an attack pattern of "Attack->Charge->Attack" represented by the string "ACA"

      name - name of the minotaur
      type - type of the minotaur
      image - image of the minotaur
      hitPoints - HP value of the minotaur
      attack - Atk value of the minotaur
      defense - Def value of the minotaur
      speed - Spd value of the minotaur
